Title: Program-by-day and room-column schedule view

Description:
Implement a schedule view that displays program items grouped by day and arranged in side-by-side room columns (time grid). The UI should show session start/end times, room names, and allow vertical scrolling by time.

Why:
Provides a visual conference-style timetable which is more intuitive for browsing simultaneous events compared to a flat list.

Acceptance criteria:
- Add a new `Schedule` view in the frontend.
- Render sessions in columns grouped by room for selected day.
- Show session title, time range, and occupancy/availability indicator.
- Include a simple time ruler along the left edge.

Labels: enhancement
